name: Space Coast Credit Union | Miami, FL
description_short: Space Coast Credit Union is a Florida-based credit union offering checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with multiple branch locations including Miami.
description_long: Space Coast Credit Union (SCCU) is a federally-chartered credit union serving Florida residents with a physical branch network throughout the state. The organization operates a South Dixie location in Miami, FL at 13793 S Dixie Highway, providing in-person banking services alongside digital channels. Founded to serve credit union members, SCCU operates as a not-for-profit financial cooperative typical of the credit union model. SCCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including multiple checking account types (Free, Interest, Student, and Health Savings Checking), savings products (Regular Savings, Money Market, My Way Savings, and youth accounts), certificates of deposit, IRAs, and debit/credit cards. On the lending side, they provide auto loans with pre-approval and refinancing options, personal loans, boat and RV loans, and an extensive mortgage portfolio covering conventional fixed-rate mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, construction-to-permanent loans, home equity products, and specialized programs like Hero Loans and no-down-payment options. They also issue multiple Visa credit card products at various rate tiers. SCCU distinguishes itself through shared branching access—members can conduct transactions at cooperative network locations beyond SCCU's direct branch footprint. They offer specialized mortgage programs including Hero Loans (targeting military members and first responders), no-closing-cost options, and jumbo mortgages. Digital services include online banking, mobile banking with mobile deposit capability, digital wallet integration, and Zelle money transfer. The South Dixie location provides specific amenities including night drop boxes, coin sorters, walk-up ATMs, and deposit-taking ATMs during limited lobby hours (M-Th 9-5, F 9-6). As a credit union, SCCU provides member-owned financial services with lending flexibility typical of the credit union sector. Like most regional credit unions, membership eligibility may be restricted by field of membership criteria.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers specialized Hero Loans program for military members and first responders
No-down-payment mortgage option available for qualified borrowers
Access to shared branching network beyond direct SCCU locations throughout Florida
Mobile deposit capability through SCCU mobile app for convenient check deposits
Multiple checking account options tailored to different member needs (student, health savings, interest-bearing)
Comprehensive mortgage portfolio including FHA, VA, construction-to-permanent, and jumbo loans
24-hour ATM and night drop box access at South Dixie location for after-hours banking
cons: Limited information on fee structure and competitive rate comparisons on the website
Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on location page
South Dixie branch has limited lobby hours (closes at 5pm weekdays except Friday)
Website does not specify whether all advertised products are available at every location
No information provided about minimum balance requirements or account opening process on location page
best_for: Military members and first responders seeking specialized Hero Loan programs
Florida residents seeking comprehensive mortgage products including government-backed loans
Credit union members needing multi-product relationships (checking, savings, lending, credit cards)
Individuals in Miami area seeking in-person banking with extended shared branch access
diagnosis: Space Coast Credit Union is best for Florida residents seeking a full-service credit union with mortgage and auto lending expertise, particularly military members qualifying for Hero Loans. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted by field of membership requirements typical of credit unions, and the website lacks detailed fee and rate comparison information to assess competitiveness.
services: Free Checking, Interest Checking, Student Checking, and Health Savings Checking accounts
Regular Savings, Money Market, My Way Savings, and Christmas Club Savings accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and IRA options including IRA CDs
Auto loans with pre-approval and refinancing options
Conventional fixed-rate mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, and construction-to-permanent loans
Home equity loans and home equity lines of credit (HELOC)
Boat and RV loans plus motorcycle and scooter loans
Personal loans including signature loans and share/CD-secured loans
Visa credit cards in multiple tiers (Signature, Platinum, Low Rate, Secured, Student)
Mobile banking with mobile deposit functionality
Shared branching access through cooperative network
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
